what_wasted_effort: Minor rework on regex escaping in classifier before successful first run.
Additional scope verification needed because git diff does not show untracked by default.
what_tools_were_missing: A reusable local helper for mandatory JSON/MD/gate receipt skeleton generation.

whether_classifier_should_be_reusable.reason: Asset classifier is standard-library, read-only, and directly reusable for future V0.6/V0.7 budget gates.

next_gate_or_check_to_improve_kpd: Add a gate requiring static reference classification before any optimization plan task.
